content: How good is Pollux?
you're going to get very mixed answers on that
I suppose a more productive question would be what would be your goals for him and what level of investment are you willing to pull for?
Pull for pull if you want Pollux Castor is just a better investment
though if your question is a simple "is he on par with major meta characters like tawil/ghelot/kath", the answer to that is no
Okay
Is he still worth to pull though?
Do you guys buy anything here after buying Horizon/Timeloop? Or just saving up until next month is also a good idea?
Also got this. Do I just use it to get Blade of the Titan? Haven't been pulling on Wheels yet, trying to get the last copy of Goliath for E2 first.
Yeah just use the selector on blade
I buy Potion supply
With the sediment buy the pulls at the very least
You’re trolling him
so you shouldnt? doesnt seem troll when building account
i guess if you add it up over the weeks it would add up to a dupe or wheel...

Whether he is or not, I still check for additional info before following anyone's advice. Thanks tho <:pray:1356053116260454534> <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> 
Just generally asking, most of the rewards are one-time in the story and some events. After all of that, do you get enough monthly income of pulls to buy both Horizon and Timeloop every month?
Horizon and time loop and a little in change every month yes
Got it, thank you.
Aurora the well know FTP buys those 2, the limited pulls, and something else if I remember correctly
Got Tawil to E1, was unlucky with pulls (Surely I didn't get Alva 3 times right)
Sociopath behavior
I spend 3.3k sediment a month and I still don’t buy that shit
After getting first Alva, the second one came in like that...at least thanks for the Tawil devs....on Tawil banner...yeah....
Also the pity on Wheels is sooner than on Characters, right?
60 instead of 90
Hmm
I'm out of silver rn, should I still try to go for E2 Tawil or try to get her Wheel first....

After those 2, I get the limited pulls, dusk and dawn wheel then standard pulls
Totaling 1700 sedimentation bill
Every month
Thank you!
What would you do in this case?
If you have unlocked battle pass wheels then your monthly sedimentation bill should be different
Buy the limited pulls
When is anniv?
Thanks
I would say E2 over wheel. if you push story should get alot of pulls and also the anni bonus upcoming
Uhm...battle pass wheels? Not sure what that is, or I simply forgot, quite a lot of information for the past days...
You see how there's 3 locked wheels? Those are it
Yeah still at Chapter 3, the game has so much to explore that yeah...should push the story now
Once you've played her more you will see how much her E2 does in practice
gives prepare (reduce cards cost each turn) to card drawn from her exalt
hello im new where i can sent my invitation code?
With my situation, would you still pull for E2 Goliath? If not, would you go to Wheels or other Realms to get characters?
Have enough knowledge already to understand how powerful her E2 is
It's just I wasn't sure how beneficial it is compared to her wheel for now
Pulling 3 Alva while going on Tawil banner is quite criminal though
I would keep pulling for goliath e2. Sanga and Celeste dupe is also useful for later but wheel banner comes before them
Thanks a lot. So I should go to Wheels as soon as I get my last Goliath, correct?
I suppose I could get needed characters from other realms with the reset thing if the devs will give one
Oh gosh, quite a lot of knowledge for the past 4 days of playing....I wish I discovered this hidden gem earlier...

E0 her wheel is more important as tawil enlightenment can be fixed with dupe mat in shop
E0 wheel cannot.
But really it doesn't matter, you have a lot of pulls left in story to hard pity if needed

Yeah, that makes sense actually, my bad for not realising...Quite an overflow of information, didn't expect to find such an amazing and fulfilling game which can also be hard at times haha. Regarding the story yeah, that's if I don't get stuck that is. Would be a skill issue in that case, my team should be more than enough to clear all of Act 1 prob.
Thanks for your time
Uhm well
That was the next x5 after my previous Goliath drop
LOL
Getting 4 SSR characters within 20 pulls feels amazing, such a shame that 2 of those SSRs are Alva
What's the prio for Deep Dive shop?
Aigis aurita then one of each wheel
what is the special ops ?
and what do we get when we complete one of them?
Regarding this card of Tawil. Does it mean that the card it will transform into in this case will be Caecus's "Protective Scales" since it's right next to "Omniscient Verity" ?
Or since It's not in the hand yet, I'll draw 5 cards next turn including "Omniscient Verity" and then the card it will transform into will be Caecus's "Strike"?
whatevers on the top of your draw pile is what it will be when its in your hand. if you draw a card, it will change to the new top of the pile
if there is no command card on top of your draw pile, it can't be played
Draw pile isn't shown in order
Ah, that's why I was confused with the cards it was transforming into...so...it's complete random then and I can't predict the card it will be used on?
You can when it is in hand it will show the top card. If you use wing to draw 1 card then you see the next top card
Can't really predict what it will be, but it predicts the next card that will be drawn. So if you have anything that draws a card it will be the one shown on omniscient then omniscient will change
Pay attention to the key word and you'll notice when you actually draw tawil's omniscient card
Hmm...if I'm not mistaken, I was getting a transformed card at the very first turn when I started the battle, can it be the case or I just confused it with another effect?
Got it, thanks
15k is the highest for daily dreams lvl60 difficulty right?
I like it when you have some insights ready to play because it lets you you know exactly what card will be drawn when you use them and if you will be able to play it.
Getting the wings, using Tawil's exalt and playing the Wings would be the most beneficial DMG wise I guess?
Btw I can't look into Wings cards in Awakeners' section, can I?
It only shows basic Tawil's skills and her Exalt
wait is mori chat gone
Might be hidden for you. Click the "Channels & Roles" at the top of the list of channes and there is a tab that lets you make things visible if they aren't
yeah it was rehidden
for some reason
cause i had it checked
I can't think of an easy way to see what the wings do except to draw them in a fight.
Well you can see twin wings when you click pinions of time but not the 4 or 6 wings
Because I just happen to have been playing have the wings
Thanks!
I havent done deep dive in a while. I want to shoot for 30k. what team should I go with?

Hello. Hope this is the right place to ask but for the 2nd phase of the 8-10 boss fight is there a gimmick to getting around the counter and summons? I find myself really struggling to survive the hits.

If I remember correctly that's || N fight || you either want to run Pandia, Pure chaos Tawil to get the Pandia card or tough it out with strong aoe.

|| N ||  will always summon, so just get your aoe ready.

Ugh that sucks so the counter on the entire fight. How would one go about using an AOE on it. I tried using Jenkins AOE and while it did good damage, the counter also makes it hurt my team which depletes my shields to survive the attack.
What's your team look like
Hello Im just starting, is there anyone I should reroll for?
Not really
Standards are like candy
You get a lot of them
Premiums are chocolate bars. You don't get a lot of them
Hmm, should I just roll for whatever then lol
Caecus, Nautila, Goliath, will always be solid standards
Keeper level is also 47 so I'm wondering if maybe I'm too under-level for this chapter. Thank you for your help.
I think you can replace flower wheel, and Caecus Sr wheel with emerge, and frenzy

Hello, started this game yesterday. Read over some of Flares' spreadsheet and it said to pull Aequor units on the starter banner. Do I need dupes in this game? If I already have these units I pasted, should I keep pulling the banner using pure core? Or start pulling wheels? Also, what should I pull for with luminous cores? Tawil?
I'm not 100% sure who to put birth lex orison on. So ask around since I haven't played with Ultra enough <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
If you started yesterday how do you have lv70 Caecus <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057> <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
Oh that's not my units, it's the one in the spreadsheet
You also have +12 wheels lol
These are my units
I put those wheels on bc it's the costco act 1 build or something haha
Tulu is lucky. Get e3 Caecus and e2 Goliath and try to find a play style that's fun. Should be able to clear up to chapter 4 and 5 comfortably
Ah I see no problem thank you for your help.
Castor, Tawil and G Murphy(12 days) are all solid for your account
awesome, I'm digging the kraken build and having fun with it
Then you'll definitely want G Murphy and Corposant to stay viable even in endgame<:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
so keep pulling aequor banner
so instead of pulling for tawil, I should pull G Murphy?
Why are we recommending a unit whose kit hasn't even been revealed yet?
wait is G Murphy the same as murphy?

No, she's not
She's the upcoming character
oh lmfao
I'll save up luminous cores just in case then

Hold onto them until we get the preview of GMurphy's kit
Then you'll be able to make a somewhat informed decision between her, Tawil and Castor <:wisdom:1400771656510734356>
What's the reshuffle limit for the deck
There's no limit
Should you use radix sentiment on luminous cores?
You'll get standards core throughout the month to gain back what you spent
Is castor usable in e0
Doresain is also a choice!
He benefits from enlightenments but his baseline is pretty high
Require investment into wheels and level caps though
can anyone tell me what this is???

Hello. Does anyone know how corrosion works exactly? Like if I stack 100 corrosion on an enemy and I do a 50 damage attack, will I be doing 150 total damage? Also I read it can go through shields so does that mean if I attack an enemy with corrosion stacks that has a shield the damage will be on the HP bar?

Those are covenants. Kinda like relics if you have ever played genshin. There is a section that opens later that allows you to obtain them. It gives extra effects like more crit rare or key flare energy.
after what chapter can i get them because i can really use to for my team rn
It is tied to your overall Keeper Level but I think it's 35 when the first one unlocks in Interlude.
oooh okok
Yup after they first unlock each new story chapter cleared will unlock a new section.

Once per turn
But I'll be honest, I still get confused by the mechanic myself sometimes <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>
I need teammates for corpo and guides how to play her team
who needs the least amount of copies from arc 2

Castor and Pickman 
Second one is kinda niche, but he does everything you want him to do at E0
what should a kath team be
Corpo and aurita

For chapter 8 what is the cheese strategy using Hameln? I know it's to put the duplicating card effect on Rondo but then I just end up drawing only insights into my deck instead of command cards? Do I use up all of Rondo even when I don't have 3 Arithmetica?
Yeah, you use it when you don't have the 3 arith. To have limitless arith next turn.
Dats it

There's some flexibility with her potential teams 
Ideally, it's something like Kath - Horla - Clementine - GRamona

But you could go for mono Chaos team with Kath - Karen - GRamona - Ryker instead 

Casiah and Tinct are both good options for her as well, you can kinda pick and choose, depending on what you value more 

There are some mentions of Caro Kath too, but I can't tell you anything about that one <:wisdom:1400771656510734356>
I don't keep track and sometimes overextend with Snow posse
Just started the game, should I try and pull for tawil's wheel? I have about 4k silver right now
You won't be guranteed. It's nice but I think building up more characters is better
You can simply grab it reruns
Hmm I see, how about the before memories fades banner, the 2x ssr and 3x wheel, seems like decent value
Is Tawil good enough at E0?
no only 50 corrosion procs, if you stack 100 corrosion, the dps should also do 100 dmg to proc all of corrosion
yes, assuming you don't have thais wheel. 1 copy is enough for now, the + hand size is very useful
only as a keyflare bot, as in you don't use her at all. if you do want to use her, e3 is comfortable enlighten
And here I was happy I even got her lmao Guess girl will collect dust
you can slowly get enlightens for her using the monthly free dupes if you really like her...but if you don't have any better keyflare bot, you can also just make her stand there and generate it
Ngl I only got her because I knew she was meta, didn't know she was meta at high dupes otherwise I wouldn't have pulled her lol

oof I hate to break it to you but a lot of units need dupes to feel comfortable to use...ofc there are units like castor & pickman are completely usable at e0, but for the most part, the rest need dupes
all meta damage dealers want dupes
so if you're planning to remain f2p, don't try to pull for everyone
Its not bad to have a copy of her, you can use store bought dupe if you want

Oh I actually was saving for her lmao since I don't really have a fav (and I already got Castor before), but I'm far from having enough to E3 her 😭 and GMurphy will probably need dupes as well so I should probably save for that instead
What is faded legacy vs astral reign?

arc 1, chapters 1-9
arc 2, currently 3 chapters
I meant mechanics
faded legacy mechanics are completely different from arc w
also the awakers that you've met in arc 1, those are from faded legacy
the ones that were released after arc 1, they're arc 2
guys does the game take a while to start on the "Enter Mythag" screen?
For me it does but that could just be because I either have slow internet or my phone is slow. I'm not sure if it's happening to anyone else but I do know that it also happens to me
i got like 300ms for ping
my internet is not slow, i consistently have like 500mbps download speed
Same here
well, i guess its something server sided
I'm thinking it's either the device or the server taking a bit to load everything
E2 would be enough to feel comfortable unless it's late game.
Only if the game is on Steam for me
It launches quite fast on mobile
Yea since as far as I know their servers are primarily in Hong Kong, so most of the players have high ping unless they live around Asia region
er just got the game and am very lost as to who to pull for.. i have celeste, what do i do now lmao

Generally people pull on Aequor standart first since they have more useful characters for beginners (Caecus has a lot of utility for example, Celeste has revive iirc, haven't used her), even though each realm has some useful ones, it's just some characters in other realms need more investment. In the end It's up to you, you can do a trial of some character you like the look of and either pull for it or ask about a specific character here.
All depends on how u wanna play the game
Just don't spend Silver into the Standart banners
when does the story get harder? im at 3-10 and its been really easy so far
Should be ch 6
alright, because i dont remember going under half HP so far
This is what pulling Aequor does to people <:breakinto:1400771681508790292>
i guess that is a person who left the server lol
I've seen on Reddit that the guy pulled for Tawil and left the game after trying to play her
While you are here, Traphase isn't mandatory to play to get daily/weekly rewards, right? Only emotes for the wins from what I saw.
It's just I'm trying to push the story, but the game has so much unlocking that I don't have time for everything

For daily rewards you play either traphase or phantasmal dive
No reason to play both, since you only get rewards from one of them, whichever is higher 

The weekly quest is shared between those two mods too
So the only traphase-exclusive rewards are the emotes and one time stuff that you get for climbing to 3k rating <:wisdom:1400771656510734356>

Yeah, just as I thought. Thanks for clarifying. I opened Traphase, saw that the characters are divided into groups and wheels have different effects and just closed it with a tear running down my face <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Same. I'm currently at ch 4, one shotting everything on the first turn (except bosses, it's easier first or second turn, depends on what cards I'll get and whether I have exalts or not)
Is this worth pulling for as a beginner?
depends on how much you're willing to spend on the game
each of those banners is ~$15
if that is not a fairly trivial amount of money to you, then I wouldn't consider it worth
hmm yeah it's not that much, just want to try and get tawil dupes lol
if you're fine with the price then the banners are pretty decent
2 limited characters + 3 limited whales is a decent amount and the pool is small so you have a good chance of hitting what you want

24 and lily aren't too fantastic since they're in standard banner as well, but if you're planning on playing Tawil long-term then any dupes of her are great, and ryker/hameln are two of her most consistent and useful team members
yeah that's what I'd figured too
who should i get from this this is a selector right? i dont have any of them besides castor and pollux
Might have missed it, but is there a way to look on which Realm those are used? The skills section only shows the requirements for the first 2 levels.

Someone dropped this earlier which may be helpful

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PkrGY4Z3vcCiFW3vZWE4-dqpEzQgQz67jYx5wIAymzQ/edit?usp=drivesdk

embeds.title: Morimens Anniversary List and Personal Recs
embeds.description: THE ANNIVERSARY IS UPON US   I feel like I’m not the only one who saw the anniversary news and immediately began scratching their heads at the the amount of stuff we’re getting, and while I am really stupid am not the greatest guide maker, I still wanted to help out the people wondering where to ...

content: look at ultimate (exalt ability), it shows which of violet material needed from 1 lvl
Ohh, got it, appreciated!
